calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori cheshire.
Petitioner: Leah Chertok-Ackerman, appearance waived.
Original Proof of Publication filed.
Decree signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Reset To Oct-25-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner: Leah Chertok-Ackerman, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Leah Rachel Springer.
Pending the Petitioner filing of the Original Proof of Publication.
Matter is continued to Oct. 25, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, no appearance is necessary. Decree submitted.
